recent_posts.text:
Most "autoscaling problems" are actually resource model problems.

Set requests from `kubectl top` data, not gut feel. CPU ≈ 50% avg. Memory ≈ 110% avg.
Limits ≈ 2x requests.

HPA is probably fine. Your requests are wrong.

#Kubernetes #DevOps #K8s
